6CPU wins (fastest of all)
0.98×CPU vs Rust
1.05×CPU vs C
0.71×CPU vs OCaml
0.67×CPU vs Haskell

Osprey is the fastest of all five languages on digitsum, factorial, hanoi, josephus, primes, tak. Lower is better; ★ marks an Osprey win.
